default.heading: Discover Your Path at Regent's University London
default.excerpt: Set in the heart of one of London's most beautiful parks, Regent's offers a truly unique environment to study, connect and grow.

simple.heading: Discover Your Path at Regent's University London
simple.excerpt: Set in the heart of one of London's most beautiful parks, Regent's offers a truly unique environment to study, connect and grow.

simple.heading: A Campus Experience Like No Other in the Capital
simple.excerpt: From world-class facilities to vibrant student societies, life at Regent's extends well beyond the lecture hall.

image.alt: Students on the Regent's tennis courts

simple.heading: Fashion, Media and the Arts: A Hub for Creative Minds
simple.excerpt: Our specialist schools bring together practitioners, researchers and students to push the boundaries of creative industries.

image.alt: Students working in the fashion studio

course.heading: Fashion Marketing
course.description: Build the skills to lead campaigns, shape brand strategy and drive growth across global fashion markets.

course.heading: International Business BA (Hons)
course.description: Develop the skills to lead and innovate in international business with a global perspective.

course.heading: Film Production & Cinematography
course.description: A practice-led programme developing advanced creative and technical skills for careers in film and screen industries.

article.heading: Five Reasons to Study in the Heart of London
article.excerpt: From world-class museums on your doorstep to an unrivalled professional network, London is more than a backdrop — it's part of your education.
article.author: Content Team

article.heading: How Regent's Shaped My Career in Global Finance
article.excerpt: MBA graduate Priya Sharma reflects on the networks, skills and confidence she built during her time at Regent's Business School.
article.author: Priya Sharma

article.heading: Sustainability in Fashion: What the Industry Must Do Next
article.excerpt: Researchers from our School of Fashion examine the pressing environmental challenges facing the global fashion industry and propose a path forward.
article.author: Dr Sarah Mitchell

event.heading: Undergraduate Open Day
event.description: Come and explore the campus, meet academics and current students, and find out everything you need to know about studying at Regent's.
event.location: Regent's University London, Inner Circle, Regent's Park

event.heading: Postgraduate Information Evening
event.description: Attend our online information evening to discover our full range of postgraduate programmes and speak directly with programme directors.

event.heading: Summer Fashion Showcase 2025
event.description: Celebrate the creative talent of graduating students from the School of Fashion at our annual end-of-year showcase.
event.location: Regent's University London, Inner Circle, Regent's Park

video.name: Jason Drew
video.quote: Studying with classmates worldwide prepared me for a global workplace.

video.name: Priya Sharma
video.quote: The campus in Regent's Park is unlike anywhere else — it genuinely feels like home.

video.name: Dr Emma Carlisle
video.quote: Being surrounded by creative industries every day pushes my research in ways I never expected.
